core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Academic Authority meets Tech Fluidity
Emotion First: Pride in attendance, Anxiety in absence (handled gently)
Content is King: Data must be legible at a glance
Zoom In: Face scan is the 'Hero Moment'
Negative Space: High density data needs breathing room
anti_patterns: Default Shadcn look (Must customize radii and shadows)

rules: Use tabular nums for data tables: font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums

scan_interface.classes: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen bg-slate-50 relative overflow-hidden
elements: Webcam feed: rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border-4 border-white w-[640px] max-w-full aspect-video z-10
Status Message: absolute bottom-12 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md px-8 py-4 rounded-full shadow-xl font-bold text-xl z-30 transition-all

shadcn_customization: Shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md for hover states
Inputs: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all
Buttons: font-semibold tracking-wide. Primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 active:scale-95 transition-transform

face_recognition.canvas_setup: Canvas must perfectly overlay the video element. Handle resize events.

feedback.scanning: White bounding box with thin stroke
feedback.success: Green (#10B981) thick bounding box + Scale up animation + Checkmark icon
feedback.error: Red (#F43F5E) bounding box + Shake animation + X icon

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'flag-icon-css' or simple SVGs for language toggle.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use Slate-900 on Slate-50.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (offset-2 ring-2 ring-blue-500).
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Wrap framing-motion animations in checks.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for dark backgrounds.
Spacing: Use multiples of 4. Minimum padding inside cards: p-6.
Language Toggle: Must be visible on all public pages (Top Right).
Face API: Load models from '/models' directory. Ensure models are cached.
Excel Export: Button should be prominent on the Dashboard (Green 'Success' variant).
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure Tailwind with the palette provided above.
3. Create the 'FaceScan' component with strict state management (Idle -> Scanning -> Success/Error -> Cooldown).
4. Implement the '1-hour Auto-Absent' logic in the backend (FastAPI background task or cron).
5. Use 'Recharts' for the Class Attendance Analytics (BarChart for attendance, LineChart for trends).
6. Ensure the 'Director Dashboard' uses the Bento Grid layout defined.
7. Mock the backend calls if actual API is not ready, but structure the data interfaces strictly (Class, Student, AttendanceRecord).
